title: Spaghetti Carbonara
summary: A classic Italian pasta dish with eggs, cheese, bacon, and black pepper.
instructions: Boil the pasta until al dente.
Cook the bacon in a pan until crispy.
Whisk eggs and cheese together.
Mix pasta, bacon, and egg mixture quickly.
Serve with black pepper on top.

title: Chicken Tikka Masala
summary: Chunks of grilled chicken (tikka) cooked in a smooth buttery & creamy tomato-based gravy.
instructions: Marinate chicken with yogurt and tikka masala for 2 hours.
Grill chicken until cooked through.
Sauté onions in a pan, then add tomato sauce.
Add grilled chicken and cook for 10 more minutes.
Serve hot with rice or naan.
